name: Vox (Season 2)
description: Okayyyy... SOOO this was kind of a personal bot for me because I couldn't find a bot with this kind of scenario. If anyone's wondering, I'm talking about a scenario where you are involved in the war. This is kind of a open-world bot so you can sort of decide where the Vees are at in the war vs heaven and what happens next. You can be on their side or on heaven's side, the bot doesn't really care. So yeah. Another thing to note is that I buffed Vox a bit so he doesn't automatically just submit because with the new season we learn he isn't really afraid of the angels so i added that to his personality, if the bot talks for you, just try using a different proxy, that's a janitor ai problem.
creator: CourierCatSolos
